response:
The CS Team’s Customer Success Quarterly update shares Q1 performance metrics, including an improved NPS of 62 (up from 58), a 4.3/5 support CSAT score, a lowered 1.2% churn rate (down from 1.8%), the top three customer feature requests (SSO, custom dashboards, and increased API rate limits), and $800K in three pending enterprise expansion opportunities.
The primary action areas tied to this update include prioritizing the requested feature enhancements to boost customer satisfaction and pursuing the pipeline of high-value enterprise expansions to drive additional revenue.
